Career & Employment Opportunities
Thank you for your interest in working with Calendar Club Canada!



Interested to work in one of our stores?

Please note that our stores are individually operated. To apply to one of our stores, please visit our Store Locator page, and contact the store directly. They will be happy to hear from you! Many of our stores also list job opportunities on their mall's website.

Visit Store Locator

Looking to work with us at our head office?

If you're interested in a role at our head office in Paris, Ontario please visit our job listing page on Indeed.



Visit Indeed Job Page

Fast Free Shipping

We offer free shipping for purchases over $55.

Secure payments

Safe and secure payment methods

Top-notch support

Real people, ready to help

Where Moments Become Memories:

We believe time is more than just a schedule—it’s an opportunity. In the rush of daily life, we often crave moments to pause, reconnect, and go back to the basics. Whether it’s planning ahead, playing together, or reminiscing about favorite memories, we help make time well spent. Our carefully curated selection of calendars, games, puzzles, and gifts is designed to spark joy, encourage connection, and bring people together. From finding the perfect gift you didn’t know you needed to discovering a game that ignites laughter a
